The '''Cargo Canister''' was a tube-shaped freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]]. The canister was used to store cargo during transit in both [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. For transport, the container was able to be carried by [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], like the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]]. The smallest of the container designs in the line, the cargo canister was often used for emergency deliveries or transportation of small but valuable cargoes.
